name: Chinese Smokey Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork spare ribs thoroughly with the Chinese dry marinade until fully coated.
2. Let the ribs stand at room temperature for 1 to 2 hours, allowing the marinade to penetrate the meat.
3. Arrange the ribs on a cooking grill or rib rack with the ends down.
4. Smoke-cook the ribs until they are tender and cooked through.
5. During the last few minutes of smoking, brush the ribs with Chinese barbecue sauce.
6. Serve the ribs with any remaining barbecue sauce.
